id: oando-site:// docs:* scripts restored for CONTENTS.md + inventory regeneration; use docs:sync or docs:sync:all.
scriptName: // docs:* scripts restored for CONTENTS.md + inventory regeneration; use docs:sync or docs:sync:all.
sourcePointer: scripts.// docs:* scripts restored for CONTENTS.md + inventory regeneration; use docs:sync or docs:sync:all.

command: eslint -c config/build/eslint.config.mjs app components features lib tests --max-warnings=0

node ../scripts/check-repo-layout.mjs && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run test:audit:hollow -- --exclude-marketing && npm run test:audit:eslint-disable && npm run lint:ui:strict

node ../scripts/check-repo-layout.mjs && npm run test:audit:hollow && npm run test:audit:gate-skips && npm run test:audit:eslint-disable && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && npm run test:a11y && npm run test:planner-catalog && npm run test:coverage && npm run test:coverage:site
npm run check:site-ui:shell && npm run check:i18n:parity && npm run check:site-ui:copy && npm run check:site-ui:inline-style && npm run check:site-ui:dialect
npm run p0:unit && npm run p0:svg
npm run test:auth:seed-users && npm run test:auth:env
npm run test:clean && playwright test -c config/build/playwright.config.ts tests/accessibility.spec.ts

npm run test:clean && playwright test -c config/build/playwright.config.ts tests/e2e/admin-smoke.spec.ts tests/e2e/planner-catalog.spec.ts tests/e2e/planner-guest-workspace.spec.ts tests/e2e/planner-custom-tools.spec.ts tests/e2e/planner-chrome.spec.ts tests/e2e/sketch-to-plan-pipeline.spec.ts tests/e2e/planner-offline-sync.spec.ts
npm run test:clean && playwright test -c config/build/playwright.config.ts tests/e2e/admin-svg-publish-p01.spec.ts --reporter=list
npm run test:clean && playwright test -c config/build/playwright.config.ts tests/e2e/site-assistant-shell.spec.ts
npm run test:clean && playwright test -c config/build/playwright.config.ts tests/e2e/site-locale-switch.spec.ts tests/e2e/site-visual-regression.spec.ts
npm run test:clean && playwright test -c config/build/playwright.config.ts tests/e2e/site-navigation-smoke.spec.ts tests/e2e/navigation-smoke.spec.ts
npm run test:clean && vitest run --coverage && node scripts/generate-coverage-report.mjs planner && node scripts/generate-vitest-report.mjs ../results/tests/vitest-results.json
npm run test:clean && vitest run --coverage --config vitest.coverage.inventory.config.ts

npm run test:clean && vitest run --coverage --config vitest.site.config.ts && node scripts/generate-coverage-report.mjs site && node scripts/generate-vitest-report.mjs ../results/tests/vitest-site-results.json
npm run test:coverage && npm run test:coverage:site
npm run typecheck && npm run test:e2e:planner-world
npx -y supabase gen types --linked --schema public > config/database/types/database.types.ts
npx tsx scripts/db_backup_upload_r2.ts && npx tsx scripts/repo_backup_upload_r2.ts
pnpm run check-sharp && pnpm --filter oando-site build && pnpm --filter oando-site-workflow-docs build
pnpm run check:layout && pnpm --filter oando-site gate:full

pnpm run check:layout && pnpm run check:ayushdocs && pnpm run check:agents-md && pnpm run check:agents-folder && pnpm run check:active-docs && pnpm run check:plans-purity && pnpm run check:docs-purity && pnpm --filter oando-site gate
pnpm run docs:sync:tech-stack && pnpm run docs:typecheck:tech-stack && pnpm run build:tech-stack
